---
title: "LOG"
generated: true
description: "The log-space algebra: logsumexp combined with addition."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.semiring.algebras`](../nitrix-semiring-algebras.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LOG -->
```python
LOG: StrictSemiring[Any] = StrictSemiring(monoid=(_LogSumExpMonoid()), binary_op=(_SumSemigroup()), identity=(-jnp.inf), annihilator=(-jnp.inf), name='log', matmul_vjp=log_matmul_vjp, ell_matmul_vjp=log_ell_matmul_vjp)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:LOG -->
The log-space algebra: logsumexp combined with addition.

Products of ordinary reals become sums in the log domain, and sums
become numerically-stable logsumexp reductions. The identity and
annihilator are $-\infty$ (the log of 0), so the contraction
computes probabilities and partition functions in log space without
underflow.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
